requirement_topic.en: Lithium Battery Transport — UN 38.3 and Dangerous Goods Documentation
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电池运输——UN 38.3及危险货物文件
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電池運輸——UN 38.3及危險貨物文件

summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries shipped to Azerbaijan must have UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3 test evidence where dangerous-goods transport rules require it. Exporters should prepare a UN 38.3 test summary, SDS, dangerous-goods classification, packaging evidence, and air, rail, road, or sea multimodal transport documents before shipment.
summary.zh: 运往阿塞拜疆的锂电芯和电池在危险货物运输规则要求时须具备《联合国试验和标准手册》第三部分38.3小节测试证据。出口商应在出货前准备UN 38.3测试概要、SDS、危险货物分类、包装证据以及空运、铁路、公路或海运多式联运文件。
summary.zht: 運往亞塞拜疆的鋰電芯和電池在危險貨物運輸規則要求時須具備《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第三部分38.3小節測試證據。出口商應在出貨前準備UN 38.3測試概要、SDS、危險貨物分類、包裝證據以及空運、鐵路、公路或海運多式聯運文件。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3
IMDG Code for sea transport where applicable
ICAO Technical Instructions / IATA DGR for air transport where applicable
Applicable rail and road dangerous-goods transport rules for Azerbaijan routing

summary.en: China exporters commonly prepare UN 38.3 reports, MSDS/SDS, transport conditions appraisal reports, and dangerous-goods packaging documents for lithium battery shipments. These remain necessary but must match the exact cell, module, rack, container, state of charge, and transport route used for Azerbaijan.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常为锂电池货运准备UN 38.3报告、MSDS/SDS、运输条件鉴定书和危险货物包装文件。这些文件仍然必要，但必须与运往阿塞拜疆的电芯、模组、电池架、集装箱、荷电状态和运输路线一致。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常為鋰電池貨運準備UN 38.3報告、MSDS/SDS、運輸條件鑑定書和危險貨物包裝文件。這些文件仍然必要，但必須與運往亞塞拜疆的電芯、模組、電池架、集裝箱、荷電狀態和運輸路線一致。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test report and test summary

gap.en: Transport evidence is configuration-specific. A UN 38.3 report for a cell may not cover a module, replacement pack, rack, containerized BESS, altered packaging, or changed state of charge. Azerbaijan importers, customs brokers, carriers, rail operators, and airlines may reject inconsistent test summaries, SDS classifications, package marks, or shipping names.
gap.zh: 运输证据与配置强相关。电芯UN 38.3报告未必覆盖模组、替换电池包、电池架、集装箱式BESS、改变后的包装或荷电状态。阿塞拜疆进口商、报关行、承运人、铁路运营方和航空公司可能拒收测试概要、SDS分类、包装标识或运输品名不一致的货物。
gap.zht: 運輸證據與配置強相關。電芯UN 38.3報告未必覆蓋模組、替換電池包、電池架、集裝箱式BESS、改變後的包裝或荷電狀態。亞塞拜疆進口商、報關行、承運人、鐵路營運方和航空公司可能拒收測試概要、SDS分類、包裝標識或運輸品名不一致的貨物。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for lithium battery transport where dangerous-goods transport rules apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export transport where dangerous-goods transport rules apply

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] AZSTAND, IEC, or Chinese GB battery safety evidence does not replace UN 38.3 transport evidence. The exact Azerbaijan shipment configuration must be covered by the UN 38.3 test summary and dangerous-goods documents.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] AZSTAND、IEC或中国GB电池安全证据不能替代UN 38.3运输证据。实际运往阿塞拜疆的配置必须被UN 38.3测试概要和危险货物文件覆盖。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] AZSTAND、IEC或中國GB電池安全證據不能替代UN 38.3運輸證據。實際運往亞塞拜疆的配置必須被UN 38.3測試概要和危險貨物文件覆蓋。
